# Launch House Ventures

> Launch House Ventures is a founder-led early-stage fund backing driven founders with capital, community, and support for product launches.

This is the canonical homepage for Launch House Ventures. The canonical URL is https://launchhouse.com/.

## Primary Page

- [Homepage](https://launchhouse.com/): Plaintext-style overview of Launch House Ventures, its focus, notable investments, and contact links.

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:contact@launchhouse.co): Contact Launch House Ventures.
- [Brett](https://x.com/thatguybg): Brett Goldstein on X.
- [Jacob](https://x.com/j__cub): Jacob on X.
- [X](https://x.com/launchhouse): Launch House on X.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/launch-house/): Launch House on LinkedIn.

## Notable Investments

- [Solace Health](https://www.solace.health/)
- [Superpower](https://superpower.com/)
- [Babylon Bio](https://babylon.bio/)
- [Solcoa](https://www.solcoaindustries.com/)
- [Paraform](https://www.paraform.com/)
